Downtown Center-Leroy St Inbound

Description:

The Downtown Center-Leroy St Inbound leaves the University Downtown Center and travels through Leroy Street in Westside Binghamton and Riverside Drive in Binghamton & Johnson City enroute to campus.


Reminder: All Inbound buses at the University Downtown Center return to campus.

Operation Time:

Weekdays:
7:20 A.M. to 12:05 A.M.


Weekends:
N/A

Notes:

Scroll below for a graphic map of the Downtown Center-Leroy St Inbound, its schedule, and the stops along its route.

① Leaves the University Downtown Center

② Leroy & Murray Streets

③ Riverside Dr & Columbus Pl

④ Arrives at the University Union


① ② ③ ④
8:40 AM 8:43 AM 8:49 AM 9:00 AM
9:25 AM 9:28 AM 9:34 AM 9:45 AM
11:00 AM 11:03 AM 11:09 AM 11:20 AM
11:50 AM 11:53 AM 11:59 AM 12:10 PM
2:00 PM 2:03 PM 2:09 PM 2:20 PM
3:35 PM 3:38 PM 3:44 PM 3:55 PM
5:05 PM 5:08 PM 5:14 PM 5:25 PM
8:05 PM 8:08 PM 8:14 PM 8:25 PM

There is no weekend DCL service. Please use BC Transit for service availability.

Bus Stops:
University Downtown Center
Leroy & Front Streets
Murray Street
Chestnut Street
Laurel Avenue
Leroy & Beethoven Streets
Riverside Dr & Beethoven St -
Lourdes Hospital
Margaret Street
Columbus Place
Elfred Street
Ethel Street
Hinman / Academic A
